site.pageTitle: Farouk Seliem | Data Analyst Portfolio - Power BI, SQL & Python

personal.name: Farouk Seliem
personal.title: Data Analyst
personal.heroHeadline: I turn raw data into insights, dashboards, and decisions.
personal.heroDescription: Versatile Data Analyst leveraging SQL, Python, Excel, and Power BI to deliver business-centric insights across finance, logistics, HR, and healthcare domains.
aboutDescription: I'm Farouk Hamed Seliem, a Data Analyst focused on transforming raw data into clear, practical, and business-ready insights using SQL, Python, Power BI, and Excel.
I have hands-on experience in data cleaning, ETL, exploratory data analysis, dashboard development, and data storytelling across logistics, finance, HR, and healthcare datasets.
My work focuses on accuracy, performance, clarity, and helping stakeholders make better decisions through reliable dashboards and analytical reports.

contactInfo.availability: Available for Data Analysis & BI Projects
contactInfo.contactIntro: Need a Power BI dashboard, SQL analysis, Python EDA, or a clear analytical report? Let's turn your data into decisions.

experiences.title: Data Analyst Intern
responsibilities: Developed hands-on expertise in data cleaning, statistical analysis, and interactive dashboard development using Excel, Power BI, and Python.
Built and delivered multiple data visualization projects, applying ETL techniques and summary statistics to transform raw data into actionable insights.

experiences.title: Data Analyst Intern
responsibilities: Analyzed HR and employee datasets using SQL to extract workforce insights and support data-driven decision-making.
Performed exploratory data analysis on healthcare datasets and identified key risk indicators across patient records.
Applied data cleaning and transformation techniques across HR, workforce, and healthcare projects.

education.title: Bachelor of Computer Science | BFCAI
education.description: Faculty of Computer and Artificial Intelligence, Benha University. Information Systems Department.

projects.title: Inventory & Supply Chain Performance Dashboard
projects.description: End-to-end Power BI dashboard to optimize supply chain efficiency and warehouse operations using DSI, turnover ratio, utilization, logistics cost, inventory levels, backorders, and lead-time trends.

projects.title: Strategic Analysis of Loan Profitability
projects.description: Interactive Power BI dashboard analyzing a $237M loan portfolio, highlighting an 8.33% default rate and strategic recommendations for diversification and regional expansion.

projects.title: Global Health Data Analytics
projects.description: Analyzed global mortality records across 204 countries and 30 years to identify leading causes of death and high-volume mortality regions.

projects.title: HR Workforce Insights
projects.description: Analyzed HR and employee datasets using SQL to extract workforce insights and support data-driven decision-making.

projects.title: Diabetes Healthcare EDA
projects.description: Exploratory data analysis on a diabetes healthcare dataset to identify key patient risk indicators and patterns.
